outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: -3.36B negative GEX amplifies price movements. Reverse smirk skew (0.69) indicates call demand and bullish bias.
outlook.summary: Spot at 563.07 is caught between massive put hedging friction (565-570) and max pain attraction at 579. Negative GEX across all expiries creates volatile conditions. Reverse smirk skew confirms bullish undercurrent despite heavy put activity. High volume/OI ratios in 565-568 puts suggest aggressive hedging, creating potential springboard effect if support holds.

levels.motivazione: Major Put OI concentration across all expiries: 21,133 (0DTE), 2,454 (Weekly), 31,464 (Monthly). Ultimate structural support level.
Extreme volume spike: 255,449 vol vs 16,771 OI (15.2x ratio). Massive dealer hedging creates price stickiness near spot.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (18,272) and Monthly (43,577). High volume confirms active interest. Key support zone.
Max pain level for 0DTE (largest expiry). 2.8% from spot. Natural price target for MM pin risk dynamics.
Dominant Call OI (15,023) in 0DTE + major Put OI Weekly (13,174) + Monthly (31,931). Critical resistance zone.
Secondary Call wall with 12,208 OI. High volume (11,226) confirms active resistance. Above max pain.
High volume Put strike: 144,385 vol vs 12,272 OI (11.8x ratio). First major support below spot.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed regime: positive 0DTE GEX stabilizes short-term, but weekly/monthly negative GEX (-14.46B combined) amplifies downside risk if support breaks
outlook.summary: Spot hovers just above 6400 RESONANCE support with extreme volume activity (96K vol). 0DTE positive GEX provides stability while institutional hedging visible in longer expiries. Max Pain magnet at 6600-6650 zone suggests upside bias if support holds.

levels.motivazione: Critical structural support across ALL expirations: 0DTE (11K OI, 96K vol = 8.7x ratio), WEEKLY (3.4K OI), MONTHLY (24.8K OI). Extreme volume signals active dealer hedging. Total GEX concentration point.
0DTE Max Pain level and dominant CALL wall (8.2K OI). Also significant in MONTHLY with 9.2K CALL OI + 24.5K PUT OI creating magnetic pin zone. 2.8% above spot.
Significant PUT OI in WEEKLY (3.8K top strike) and MONTHLY (13.4K). Near-spot resistance to downside. Weekly Max Pain alignment at 6650 extends magnetic zone.
Extreme volume spike: 42.9K vol / 3.9K OI = 10.9x ratio. Indicates active gamma hedging just below spot. High intraday friction level.
Major 0DTE PUT wall (14.2K OI, 23.9K vol). Secondary structural support with MONTHLY confluence (18.3K OI). Bears' last defense before 6200.
0DTE CALL wall (7.8K OI) with WEEKLY CALL confluence (1.9K OI). Upper resistance boundary. MONTHLY shows 17.8K PUT OI indicating institutional hedging.
